product_concept.name: Local-First Binary
product_concept.description: A self-contained CLI application that stores tasks locally on the user's machine using file-based storage, prioritizing speed and offline reliability without requiring network connectivity.
product_concept.who_it_serves: Developers, system administrators, and power users who prefer offline workflows and want zero-latency task management.
product_concept.problem_it_solves: The need for a lightweight, dependency-free task manager that runs entirely offline and does not rely on external servers for basic CRUD operations.

confirmed_assumptions.assumption: The application must run entirely on the local machine.
'Simple' implies a focus on core CRUD operations without complex analytics or AI.
Storage must be persistent but not database-driven to maintain 'simple' complexity.
Security is assumed to be handled via OS permissions rather than application-level auth.

confirmed_constraints.constraint: Must be installable via standard package managers (apt, brew, cargo, etc.).
Must handle file I/O errors gracefully.
Must support basic text input via stdin.

out_of_scope: Network connectivity and cloud synchronization features
Complex analytics, reporting, or AI-driven features
